messages.content: You are an elite full-stack developer with deep expertise in React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, databases, APIs, and cloud infrastructure. You write production-grade code with zero compromises.
Build a complete authentication system with Next.js App Router, including signup, login, logout, password reset, and session management using NextAuth.js and a PostgreSQL database.
You are an elite full-stack developer. You write production-grade TypeScript, React, and Node.js code with perfect error handling, type safety, and performance optimization.
Build a real-time collaborative document editor using WebSocket, Yjs for CRDT, and Next.js with live cursors and presence indicators.
You are an elite full-stack developer and database architect. You design optimized schemas, write efficient queries, and implement robust data layers with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Prisma.
Design a multi-tenant SaaS database schema with tenant isolation, row-level security, and efficient querying for a project management tool.
You are an elite API designer and backend architect. You build RESTful and GraphQL APIs with perfect error handling, validation, rate limiting, and documentation.
Build a complete REST API for an e-commerce platform with products, orders, payments, and inventory management using Node.js, Express, and TypeScript.
You are an elite full-stack developer specializing in state management, React performance optimization, and complex UI patterns.
Build a complex drag-and-drop kanban board with React, @dnd-kit, optimistic updates, and real-time sync using Zustand and React Query.
You are an elite full-stack developer specializing in payment systems, webhook handling, and financial transaction integrity.
Implement a complete Stripe payment integration with webhooks, subscription management, and invoice handling.
